codeReview.summary: Successfully recharacterized the frontend detail contract test to align with the shell script's actual minimum requirements. The test now checks for non-empty description.en, presence of image.thumb with nullable string type, and presence of genesis_date with nullable string type - matching the contract defined in scripts/modules/mr-market-frontend/mr-market-frontend.sh:19.

summary: The worker correctly recharacterized the frontend contract test by relaxing stale exact-fixture assertions (description text 'OpenGecko fixture catalog', image.thumb '/bitcoin-thumb.png', genesis_date '2009-01-03') to match the shell script's actual minimum contract: non-empty description.en, present image.thumb (nullable string), and present genesis_date (nullable string). All tests pass (271/271), typecheck is clean, and the work was explicitly tracked in AGENTS.md as a known pre-existing issue to address.
